decisions.decision: Haiku for evaluation instead of Sonnet
decisions.rationale: User's API key doesn't have access to Sonnet models — all Sonnet model IDs return 404

decisions.decision: Zurich multi-column table restructurer in assemble_text_v2
decisions.rationale: PyMuPDF get_text() scrambles 3-column financial tables — labels and values get misassociated
Simple file-based persistence, loaded into system prompt via get_rules_prompt()
Triggers automatic re-extraction of PDFs extracted with older prompt versions

decisions.decision: otros_cargos as separate field from recargo
decisions.rationale: Zurich 'Otros Servicios Contratados' is distinct from 'Financiamiento'

next_action: Upload real PDFs from all 10 insurers and run evaluate-all to validate extraction quality, then create golden dataset fixtures
context_notes: All code is committed and pushed. v2.0 milestone phases 13-17 complete (with minor gaps: 16-03 unchecked, golden dataset empty). Phase 18 informal work (financial fields, eval UI, rules system) shipped in 15eb54b. Project is in a stable state — next work requires real PDF testing.
